Values.SENDER_EMAIL: If Domain available please use (SENDER_EMAIL) otherwise add gmail account below account
Values.GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD: GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD (App password generated from google account)
Values.NOTIFICATION_EMAIL: **Email address to receive notifications, can be same as sender email**
Values.IPINFO_API_KEY: **IPINFO_API_KEY for fetching user location from IP address, optional if you want to log user location in security audit list**
Values.SECURITY_AUDIT_LIST_ID: SECURITY_AUDIT_LIST_ID (Optional, if you want to log security events like OTP verification, signature completion etc.)
